title: $SPACE_FOR_MINUS_SIGN
text: $SPACE_FOR_MINUS_SIGN Add a trailing space for suppressed trailing minus (-) signs for positive numbers. $SPACE_FOR_MINUS_SIGN { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: Uniface 8: 0 , Uniface 9: 1 Description Setting $SPACE_FOR_MINUS_SIGN = 1 causes Uniface to add a trailing space for a positive number when the format contains a trailing minus sign, for example, DIS(b99-) . Since Uniface 6.1e, layout display code B (for "Spaces for suppressed zeros, minus (-) and plus (+) signs") has not worked in a consistent way. This setting has been introduced to enforce consistent behavior, yet allow for the current behavior in later versions of Uniface. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
